title: Emartbuy 1000 Grams / 1 Kg Shredded Paper, Ideal for Gift Decoration, Hamper Filling and Gift Packaging - Cream
features: Premium Material: Made from high-quality tissue paper, ensuring a soft and fluffy texture that’s gentle on all items.
Color Variety: Available in multiple colors to match any theme or occasion, enhancing the overall appeal of your gifts or decorations.
Versatile Applications: Perfect for filling wine boxes, gift baskets, or as wrapping for various gift packaging needs. It adds a touch of sophistication to any package.

Occasion-Ready: Suitable for decorating packages for birthdays, anniversaries, weddings, Christmas, Easter, and more, providing a festive and elegant look. Protective Cushioning: Offers excellent protection for delicate items, ensuring they remain safe and intact during transport.

Convenient Packaging: Comes neatly packed in a bag for easy storage and handling, ready to use whenever needed. Bulk Availability: Can be purchased in large quantities for event planners or retail packaging needs.
description: Product Description Treasure away your precious moments and delightful gifts with the various shredded paper from Emartbuy. These shredded paper enhance the mood and complement the presents. They are artistically designed and very resourceful. These keep your surprise safe and ready to be gifted to someone special. Quality Packaging Filler Impress any gift recipient with this pretty shredded filling in any gift box, complete with shredded paper fill inside and make it a special gift. Excellent Decoration These are beautifully designed to add charm to your gifts. They are functional and extremely fashionable. You can use these shreds for basket filling, wine box filler, gift packaging, and wrapping, or other fillers. Complement's the Gift These colorful shredded paper make it more convenient to pack your gifts and also provide more space for the present. The box gives an eye-catching complement to your gift. You can use the shredded paper for beautifully decorating your gift package, suitable for various occasions such as birthdays, anniversaries, weddings, Christmas, Easter, and more. Specifications Colour: Cream Product Weight (gm): 1000 Grams / 1 Kg Paper Material: Paper Packaging: Comes in a bag
